evals.prompt: /onboarding-project (project.json does not exist — .vista/ dir exists but no project.json)
evals.expected_output: Tells user to open the Electron app. No user questions asked. No files created.

assertions.text: Response mentions app / アプリ / Electron app
No AskUserQuestion calls made (no project info solicited from user)

evals.prompt: /onboarding-project (project.json exists with isOnboardingCompleted: true; user selects '更新' then updates currentInitiatives)
evals.expected_output: Shows current values, collects only changed field, merges project.json, regenerates project.md, shows completion message with company name.

assertions.text: Shows current values before collecting updates
Only the changed field (currentInitiatives) is updated; other fields preserved

evals.prompt: /onboarding-project (project.json exists with isOnboardingCompleted: true; user selects '続ける')
evals.expected_output: Shows one-line summary. Exits immediately after '続ける'. No files modified.

assertions.text: Shows one-line summary with company.name and myWork.domain
Exits immediately after '続ける' with no further questions
